zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Freeman II於1596年7月25日在英國素可普爾波洛受洗時，他的父親Edmund Freeman24歲，母親Alice Coles21歲。他於1617年6月16日與Bennet Hodsoll在英國素可考福爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼桑德維其住了大約10年。他於1641年被列為deputy of plymouth colony。他去世於1682年10月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波桑德維其享年86歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波包恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Freeman II于1596年7月25日在英国素可普爾波洛受洗时，他的父亲Edmund Freeman24岁，母亲Alice Coles21岁。他于1617年6月16日与Bennet Hodsoll在英国素可考福爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼桑德維其住了大约10年。他于1641年被列为deputy of plymouth colony。他去世于1682年10月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波桑德維其享年86岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波包恩。

nameMeanings.name: Freeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English freman, fremon ‘freeman, free-born man’ (Old English frēomann, frīgmann), used also occasionally as a personal name. As an African American surname it was in many cases adopted as a name denoting a man freed of slavery. See also Fryman and Free .
Irish: Anglicized (‘translated’) form of Gaelic Ó Saoraidhe (see Seery ).

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

variants.name: Fryman
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Frymann or German Freimann (see Freiman ), and possibly also of the Dutch cognate Vrijman.
English: from Middle English friman ‘free-born man’ (Old English frīomann, frīgmann), symonymous with Freeman 1.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Freeman II was christened on 25 July 1596, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, his father, Edmund Freeman, was 24 and his mother, Alice Coles, was 21. He married Bennet Hodsoll on 16 June 1617, in Cowfold, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America for about 10 years. In 1641, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as deputy of plymouth colony. He died on 4 October 1682, in Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 86, and was buried in Bourne, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Freeman II a été baptisé le 25 juillet 1596, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Freeman, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Coles, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Bennet Hodsoll le 16 juin 1617, à Cowfold, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 10 ans. En 1641, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est deputy of plymouth colony. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1682, à Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Bourne, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Freeman II am 25. Juli 1596 in Pulborough, Sussex, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Freeman 24 und seine Mutter Alice Coles 21. Er hat am 16. Juni 1617 in Cowfold, Sussex, England Bennet Hodsoll geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 10 Jahre lang in Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. 1641, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als deputy of plymouth colony aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1682 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Bourne, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Freeman II è stato battezzato il 25 luglio 1596 nel Pulborough, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Edmund Freeman, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice Coles, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Bennet Hodsoll il 16 giugno 1617, nel Cowfold, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America per circa 10 anni. Nel 1641, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come deputy of plymouth colony. Morì il 4 ottobre 1682, nel Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Bourne, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Freeman IIが1596年7月25日にイギリススセックスプウルボロウで洗礼を受けた時，父Edmund Freemanは24歳，母Alice Colesは21歳であった。1617年6月16日にイギリススセックスコウフォルドでBennet Hodsollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーサンドウィチに約10年間住んでいた。1641年，45歳の時，職業はdeputy of plymouth colonyと記録されている。彼は1682年10月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルサンドウィチで86歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Freeman II(이)가 1596년 7월 25일 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Freeman(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Coles(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1617년 6월 16일 영국 수세스 코우폴드에서 Bennet Hodsoll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 샌드위치에서 약 10년 동안 살았다. 1641년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 deputy of plymouth colony이었다. 그는 1682년 10월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 샌드위치에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 본에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Freeman II foi batizado em 25 de julho de 1596, em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Freeman, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Coles, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Bennet Hodsoll em 16 de junho de 1617, em Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America por quase 10 anos. Em 1641, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como deputy of plymouth colony. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1682, em Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Bourne, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Freeman II был крещен 25 июля 1596 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Freeman было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Coles, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Bennet Hodsoll 16 июня 1617 г. в местности коуфолд, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности сэндвич, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика около 10 лет. В 1641 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии deputy of plymouth colony. Он умер 4 октября 1682 г. в местности сэндвич, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности бурн, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Freeman II se bautizó el 25 de julio de 1596, en Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Freeman, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice Coles, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Bennet Hodsoll el 16 de junio de 1617, en Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America durante unos 10 años. En 1641, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era deputy of plymouth colony. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1682, en Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Bourne, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
